notes: Telerivet does not publish an OpenAPI/Swagger spec, so this document was authored by hand from the Telerivet REST API docs. Base URL https://api.telerivet.com/v1; auth is HTTP Basic with the API key as username. Covers 10 operations: sendMessage (the only endpoint the OpenFn adaptor actually calls today via send/sendBulk -> POST /projects/{project_id}/messages/send), plus sendBroadcast, sendMulti, queryMessages, getMessage, updateMessage, getOrCreateContact, queryContacts, getContact, updateContact. The adaptor's ast.json exposes no adaptor-specific operations (only common helpers), so endpoint coverage was derived from the adaptor README/source and the vendor docs. Field-level schemas for Message/Contact/Broadcast are representative of documented fields but not exhaustive; vars (custom fields) are modeled as open objects.
